TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Imaorod, title = Imaorod, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Imaorod} }

S.FORM: alang Imaorod ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Lang-syo go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 306 buwan, 726 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 511 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 215 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Yami 63%, Amis 4%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Imaorod hya' ga Iratay. tay 'zil na Imaorod hya' ga Yayo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Imaorod ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. psatu tegami maki psatu tegami. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Imaorod ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Lang-syo go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 306 buwan, 726 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 511 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 215 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Yami 63%, Amis 4%, Paywan 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Imaorod hya' ga Iratay. tay 'zil na Imaorod hya' ga Yayo. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Imaorod ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. psatu tegami maki psatu tegami. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč imaoro* …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu laŇč-s~…ējo …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, jami **%, amis~…ē *%, pajwan *%, ő≤unun *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na imaoro* ńßja Ē …£a irataj. taj Ēzil na imaoro* ńßja Ē …£a jajo. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč imaoro* …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. ps~…ēatu te…£ami maki ps~…ēatu te…£ami. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
